---
title: "Roper iPOLL"
page-layout: article
---

# Roper iPOLL

## Description

Public opinion database of U.S. national survey questions and responses dating back to 1935. Supports polling, political behavior, and social trends research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Government & Public Policy, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Survey & Polling Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Survey & Polling Data, Historical Archives, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb2725)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
